[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person with dark, shoulder-length hair looking at the camera while holding a hand near their chin.

Main Subject:
The main subject is a person captured from the chest up, with dark brown or black, shoulder-length straight hair framing their face. Their head is slightly tilted, they face forward toward the camera, and their expression appears neutral. One hand is raised with fingers positioned near the chin, as if lightly touching or resting under the face.

Setting:
The background is an indoor, softly lit setting with plain, light-colored walls. The lighting looks warm and uneven, likely from a nearby light source, and the image has a slightly soft or blurred quality.

Visual Details:
The person wears a light-colored top with a collar. Their skin appears softly lit with mild highlights on the face. The hair covers part of the forehead with strands falling across it. The camera angle is slightly above or level with the face, and the composition is tightly cropped so the face and raised hand dominate the frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up indoor portrait of a person with dark hair and a light-collared top. They look directly at the camera with a hand positioned near their chin.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
